meta.notes: Tone → typography mapping for 'casual'. Tests tone_typography_alignment without a creative_direction override. casual maps to sans + gold/white + fade-in/pop-in per the prompt's table; this fixture picks the white+fade-in path. Also tests the 'other' placeholder kind — medium size (not large, not small), no font-cycle, accel_at_s null, start_s in the 0.5-1.5s envelope for an other-kind label.
